# Prima Materia

> 1:1 Alchemical Coaching and somatic bodywork practice. Uses the ancient framework of the five classical elements (Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Ether) to work with the body as a map for transformation, not a problem to fix.

Prima Materia is run by Imen, a practitioner working at the intersection of somatic bodywork, energy work, and coaching, based between Berlin and elsewhere. The core offering is the 1:1 Alchemical Journey: a minimum 3-month container combining somatic practice, elemental bodywork, and energy work, available in person or via video call. Work is done with a small number of clients at a time; each journey is designed individually rather than following a fixed curriculum.

The five elements structure the work, addressed in sequence from foundational to expansive:
- Earth — stability, bones, legs, foundational safety in the body
- Water — emotional release, hips, psoas, digestive system, restoring flow
- Fire — life force, breath, chest, lungs, reigniting passion and drive
- Air — mental clarity, nervous system, head, shifting thought patterns
- Ether — connection, energetic body, intuition, creative and infinite potential

## Sections

- [Home / Hero](https://primamateriacoaching.com/) — core positioning: "Your body is a portal."
- [Is This You](https://primamateriacoaching.com/#mirror) — who this work is for
- [The Five Elements](https://primamateriacoaching.com/#journey) — the elemental framework underlying the coaching journey
- [How We Work Together](https://primamateriacoaching.com/#process) — three-step process: discovery call, mapping the landscape, ongoing sessions
- [About Imen](https://primamateriacoaching.com/#about) — practitioner background: Master's in Engineering, prior corporate/consulting career, frameworks studied include Animano Somatic Bodywork, Tree of Life, Tarot, Integral Theory, and Sufism
- [FAQ](https://primamateriacoaching.com/#faq) — format (in-person or online), minimum 3-month duration, no prior experience required, how it differs from therapy
